task_completion.description: Open the 'Mitosis' sample image in ImageJ.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ImageJ application is open with an image window titled 'Mitosis.tif' or 'mitosis.tif'.

task_completion.description: Create a Max Intensity Z-Projection of the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image window titled 'MAX_Mitosis.tif' (or similar) is visible, or the Z-Projection dialog box is open with 'Max Intensity' selected.

task_completion.description: Record the X, Y centroid coordinates for Frames 1, 6, 11, 16, and 21.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Results table in ImageJ, or a text editor/spreadsheet showing the recorded X, Y coordinates for the specified frames.

task_completion.description: Save the tracking results in CSV format to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/tracking_trace.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or file manager showing the file 'tracking_trace.csv' saved in the '~/ImageJ_Data/results/' directory with 'Frame, X, Y' columns.

integrity.description: The agent used the ImageJ GUI to open the image and perform the Z-projection.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ImageJ interface being actively used, rather than just terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent manually tracked the cells using ImageJ tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Point selections on the image, use of the Multi-point tool, or the ImageJ Results table being populated with measurements.

integrity.description: The recorded coordinates appear to be derived from actual measurement.
integrity.visual_evidence: The coordinates in the CSV roughly match the expected trajectory (starting near X=145, Y=130 and ending near X=170, Y=130) and are not just random numbers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target cell starts near X=145, Y=130 in Frame 1. The right-most daughter cell moves to approximately X=162, Y=125 by Frame 21. The ground truth coordinates for Frames 1, 6, 11, 16, 21 are approximately (145, 130), (146, 130), (145, 130), (155, 130), and (170, 130), with a tolerance of 25 pixels. The final output must be saved to /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/tracking_trace.csv.
